subtasks.description: Query licenses database to group by publisher and compute aggregate metrics: total contract value, average cost per seat, and count of licenses per publisher

plan.cost_rationale: Single subtask required: this is one aggregation query against a single license data source. Grouping, summing, averaging, and counting are all standard SQL operations that can be combined in one query with GROUP BY and aggregate functions. A small tier is sufficient—the query is straightforward SQL with standard aggregation functions and no complex CTEs, window functions, or multi-table joins. No cross-source reconciliation or policy evaluation is needed."

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) AS average_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
